member.name: T:Meridian.Infrastructure.CppTrader.Execution.CppTraderLiveFeedAdapter
member.summary: Session-local feed cache populated from CppTrader execution events.

member.name: T:Meridian.Infrastructure.CppTrader.Execution.CppTraderOrderGateway
member.summary: Process-backed simulated order gateway that delegates matching to an external CppTrader host.

member.name: T:Meridian.Infrastructure.CppTrader.Options.CppTraderOptions
member.summary: Runtime options for the external CppTrader integration layer.

member.name: P:Meridian.Infrastructure.CppTrader.Protocol.CppTraderJsonContext.GeneratedSerializerOptions
member.summary: The source-generated options associated with this context.

member.name: T:Meridian.Infrastructure.CppTrader.Providers.CppTraderItchIngestionService
member.summary: Opens ITCH ingestion sessions on the external CppTrader host process and returns the session identifier. The host will begin streaming market data for the configured symbols once the session is active.

member.name: M:Meridian.Infrastructure.CppTrader.Providers.CppTraderItchIngestionService.#ctor(Meridian.Infrastructure.CppTrader.Host.ICppTraderHostManager,Microsoft.Extensions.Options.IOptionsMonitor{Meridian.Infrastructure.CppTrader.Options.CppTraderOptions})
member.summary: Opens ITCH ingestion sessions on the external CppTrader host process and returns the session identifier. The host will begin streaming market data for the configured symbols once the session is active.

member.name: M:Meridian.Infrastructure.CppTrader.Providers.CppTraderItchIngestionService.OpenFeedAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Opens a new ITCH ingestion session for the specified source and returns its session identifier.
member.param: Logical source identifier (e.g. feed name or venue code) passed as the session name.
member.returns: The session ID assigned by the host.
member.exception: Thrown when ITCH ingestion is disabled in configuration.

member.name: T:Meridian.Infrastructure.CppTrader.Providers.CppTraderMarketDataClient
member.summary: Streaming market-data provider backed by a CppTrader ITCH ingestion session. Receives and events from the native host and forwards them to the domain and for pipeline processing.

member.name: M:Meridian.Infrastructure.CppTrader.Providers.CppTraderMarketDataClient.TryRegisterSymbolInBackground(System.String)
member.summary: Registers with the native host session in the background if a session is active and the symbol has not already been registered. The returned task is tracked and awaited during .

member.name: M:Meridian.Infrastructure.CppTrader.Providers.CppTraderMarketDataClient.HandleBookSnapshot(Meridian.Infrastructure.CppTrader.Protocol.CppTraderBookSnapshot)
member.summary: Converts a full order-book snapshot into a series of incremental depth inserts consumed by . The symbol stream is reset before insertion so that stale levels are cleared before the fresh snapshot is applied.

member.name: T:Meridian.Infrastructure.CppTrader.Replay.CppTraderReplayService
member.summary: Creates replay sessions on the external CppTrader host process and returns the session identifier. Callers use the returned session ID to correlate subsequent replay events received via the host.

member.name: M:Meridian.Infrastructure.CppTrader.Replay.CppTraderReplayService.#ctor(Meridian.Infrastructure.CppTrader.Host.ICppTraderHostManager,Microsoft.Extensions.Options.IOptionsMonitor{Meridian.Infrastructure.CppTrader.Options.CppTraderOptions})
member.summary: Creates replay sessions on the external CppTrader host process and returns the session identifier. Callers use the returned session ID to correlate subsequent replay events received via the host.

member.name: M:Meridian.Infrastructure.CppTrader.Replay.CppTraderReplayService.CreateReplaySessionAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Opens a new replay session on the CppTrader host and returns its session identifier.
member.returns: The session ID assigned by the host.
member.exception: Thrown when replay is disabled in configuration.
